use_cases: Comment and feedback systems with @mention user selection
Team collaboration tools requiring user tagging functionality
Rich text inputs with fuzzy search and filtering for suggestions
Messaging interfaces with smart text input and auto-complete features
Social platforms with mention-based user references
ai_summary: A smart text input component that supports text segments and @mentions with fuzzy filtering capabilities. Enables users to type with intelligent suggestions and user reference functionality, commonly used in commenting systems, collaboration platforms, and messaging interfaces where user tagging enhances interaction.
